entry.name: Tegile_IntelliFlash_Troubleshooter_API
entry.description: Responsible to make sure there's no outstanding issue with the API contact
entry.technology:
Developed by AS staff (Vitor Santos - 07/30/2020)
##Making use of IntelliFlash API v2.3/2.4
Using the module(s) below:
getDisks;

attribute.name: scriptgroovy

datapoint.name: Code
datapoint.description:
Retrieve the output code
1 - Credential Issue
